introduction: This deep chamber was clearly used for more than mining. Strange symbols are carved into the walls, surrounding a circular pattern on the floor.
Ritual implements—censers, carved totems, and blood-stained altars—suggest dark ceremonies were performed here long before Henrik's crew arrived.
The symbols match those you've seen at the Hill Ruins and Swamp Church. The cult was using this mine for their rituals, drawn by the power of the Aethel Ore.
This explains why Henrik sealed the mine—he must have discovered evidence of cult activity and wanted to prevent them from accessing the ore's power.
As you examine the chamber, you notice something unusual behind the largest ore deposit...
